layoutRegions.name: vault-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarizes evidence readiness, sealed packets, rollback expiry, and audit gaps.

layoutRegions.name: packet-vault
layoutRegions.purpose: Lists completed removal batches with snapshots, receipts, retention state, and rollback expiry.

layoutRegions.name: audit-workbench
layoutRegions.purpose: Tracks auditor requests, exception reopenings, communication receipts, and chain-of-custody steps.

components.name: EvidencePacket
components.purpose: Completed removal batch card with sealed snapshot and retention metadata.
interactions: status labels remain visible at all widths
snapshot ids wrap without horizontal scrolling

components.name: AuditorRequest
components.purpose: Request row for pending audit evidence asks and due dates.
interactions: request details remain readable on narrow viewports

components.name: RetentionCard
components.purpose: Small metric card for hold, checksum, missing receipt, and purge-blocker counts.
interactions: tone colors are semantic token mixes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
